data.title: Tributes for wrestling legend Hulk Hogan and rocker Ozzy Osbourne rise as they both passed away, aged 71 and 76.
data.description: Renowned professional wrestler Hulk Hogan, whose real name is Terry Bollea, tragically passed away in a hospital on Thursday at the age of 71. This news comes shortly after the death of musician Ozzy Osbourne, who died at the age of 76.

data.title: Ether ETFs outperform Bitcoin for 6 days with $2.4B inflow. BlackRock's ETHA sees highest growth in assets.
data.description: In the recent six trading days, Ether exchange-traded funds (ETFs) saw an impressive influx of approximately $2.4 billion. Among these, BlackRock's ETHA emerged as the top recipient of this substantial inflow.

data.title: Judge in Texas denies Logan Paul's attempt to fault co-founders for CryptoZoo NFT project downfall.
data.description: A judicial official in Texas has rejected Logan Paul's attempt to shift blame onto the co-founders for the CryptoZoo NFT project's failure.

data.title: AS Tallinna Vesi to present Q2 2025 results in investor webinar; inviting shareholders, investors, analysts, and stakeholders.
data.description: AS Tallinna Vesi is hosting an investor conference webinar to present the results for the second quarter and first six months of 2025. The webinar is open to shareholders, investors, analysts, and interested stakeholders. This event will provide a comprehensive overview of the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc received notification that Baker Steel Resources Trust Ltd has crossed a threshold for a relevant change.
data.description: In St. Helier, Jersey on July 25, 2025, Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc disclosed that Baker Steel Resources Trust Ltd has surpassed a threshold triggering a notification of a significant change, as per the AIM Rules for Companies. Caledonia, listed on NYSE American under CMCL, AIM under CMCL, and VFEX under CMCL, shared this development.
Annual financial report released, AGM notice issued. Key details: important numbers available.

data.title: Abivax fully exercises underwriters' option to buy additional ADSs, raising offering proceeds to $747.5M (€637.5M).
data.description: Abivax has confirmed that the underwriters have fully exercised their option to purchase additional ADSs, leading to a total gross proceeds of $747.5 million (€637.5 million) from the offering.

data.title: Kalmar's financial report for Jan-June 2025 shows robust performance with high order intake in Q2.
data.description: According to recent data, the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has reached over 300,000, with nearly 15,000 new cases reported in the past 24 hours. The death toll has also risen to over 5,000, with 300 new fatalities recorded today. Health officials are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines to help curb the spread of the virus. The government has implemented stricter measures in heavily affected regions to control the situation. Additionally, over 200,000 individuals have recovered from the virus so far, bringing a glimmer of hope amidst the ongoing crisis.
